mapper.select:
SELECT GETUSERNAME(GATE_CD, USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS USER_NM , USER_ID , ACCESS_DATE , SCREEN_ID , GETMULTINAME(GATE_CD, 'SC', #{ses.langCd}, '', SCREEN_ID) AS SCREEN_NM , SCREEN_CRUD , MASK_RMK , MASK_SQ , MASK_APPROVAL , MASK_APPROVAL_RETURN FROM STOCMASK WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd}
AND REG_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND REG_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(GATE_CD, USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{USER_NM}) '%'
AND MASK_APPROVAL IS NULL AND SCREEN_CRUD = 'T' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
